description: Talk about style and space rolled into one medium sized bag, and there's no better bagckpack you can find than this one from adidas. Neatly designed with lots of organizer space, this bag also makes for a great everyday wear to school, college and even work.Capacity: 6kgMade of 100% polyester with a 100% polyester shell for durability and easy cleaning Branded zippers and sliders for easy use and longer life of the bagOne main copiously spaced zippered compartment with a separator One front zippered compartment with a separatorTwill tape haul loop for handling ease Wide, adjustable padded handles for carrying ease and to protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomically padded back for carrying comfort Branding with patented 3-Stripes printed on the front pouch for styleCare only hand washClean with a damp cloth when necessary Do not bleach, tumble dry or wringLine dry Do not iron
